tests.scenario: Provide a clear and visible indicator of its emotional support capabilities on the main screen in the primary flow
steps: Open the relevant screen or feature for this requirement
Perform the primary user action described by the requirement
Observe the system response and compare it against the acceptance criteria
tests.expected_result: Given the user opens the main screen, when the screen finishes loading, then the interface shows a clear and visible indicator of its emotional support capabilities.

tests.scenario: Provide a clear and visible indicator of its emotional support capabilities on the main screen in a repeat or follow-up flow
steps: Open the same feature in a realistic follow-up or repeat-use situation
Perform the requirement-related action again while preserving the same flow
Verify that the system still satisfies the stated acceptance criteria
tests.expected_result: Given the user opens the main screen, when the screen finishes loading, then the interface shows a clear and visible indicator of its emotional support capabilities.

tests.scenario: Allow users to access a list of self-help exercises and tools without requiring a subscription in the primary flow
